requirement.description: The gateway shall periodically transmit an operational presence message on the CAN bus to indicate that it is active and functioning.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_ID = 0x100
GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_DLC = 8

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'vector'),
        channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 0),
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def collect_gw_messages(bus, duration_sec=1.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == GW_OPERATIONAL_PRESENCE_ID:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

def get_alive_counter(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    return data_bytes[0]

def get_gateway_status(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    return data_bytes[1]

test_cases.title: Verify GW_OperationalPresence message is transmitted when Gateway is active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway ECU operational; Monitor CAN ID 0x100
test_cases.expected_result: GW_OperationalPresence message present on CAN bus

test_cases.title: Verify GW_OperationalPresence is transmitted periodically
test_cases.expected_result: Messages transmitted periodically without excessive gaps

test_cases.title: Verify GW_AliveCounter increments modulo 256
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_op_003_alive_counter(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 2
    for i in range(1, len(msgs)):
        prev = get_alive_counter(msgs[i-1].data)
        curr = get_alive_counter(msgs[i].data)
        assert (curr - prev) % 256 == 1

test_cases.title: Verify GW_Status indicates operational state
Verify GW_OperationalPresence DLC is correct
Verify GW_OperationalPresence stops when Gateway powers OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_op_006_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert not msgs_after

test_cases.title: Verify GW_OperationalPresence resumes after restart
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_op_007_resume_after_restart(can_bus):
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
